title: Forgotten Screams
description: Stylized horror modpack with scary entities, deadly natural disasters, and a haunting atmosphere
body:
![Forgotten Screams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29890253412b7a83455d9e60c39c370ec97a1477.png)
---

**"Stylized horror Minecraft modpack that plunges players into a terrifying world filled with creepy entities, unpredictable natural disasters, and a deeply immersive, eerie atmosphere. Every corner hides danger, every sound could mean death, and survival is anything but guaranteed. Perfect for those who want their Minecraft experience darker, harder, and way more intense"**
